commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Convex migrations-component backfill for estimated historical skill install counts, including estimator logic, schema fields/indexes, denormalized stat synchronization, generated API types, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an administrative production data backfill rather than a bug report. The behavior is source-reviewable through the migration path, and the PR body includes Convex runtime and dry-run evidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can add durable docs/spec coverage without changing the migration model or code path.

target.title: Add skill install backfill migration
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a privacy-preserving one-time skill install backfill model based on aggregate skill-level stats.
- Adds a Convex migrations-component migration that bumps `statsInstallsAllTime`, keeps legacy nested stats in sync, and refreshes publisher/search denormalized rows.
- Stores an `installBackfill` audit object on bumped skill rows with the model version, clean-window counts, rate inputs, pending-event compensation, previous installs, target installs, and bump amount.

## What Changed
| File | Net change |
| --- | --- |
| `convex/lib/skillInstallBackfill.ts` | Adds the estimator, model constants, and idempotent patch builder. |
| `convex/migrations.ts` | Adds the tracked install backfill migration, dry-run/apply action, clean-window readiness guard, pending stat-event compensation, publisher stat sync, and search digest sync. |
| `convex/schema.ts` | Adds `skills.installBackfill` audit fields and `skillStatEvents.by_skill_processed`. |
| `convex/lib/skillInstallBackfill.test.ts` | Covers estimator behavior, idempotency, no-lowering behavior, and pending install/download compensation. |
| `convex/migrations.test.ts` | Covers dry-run/confirm gating, clean-window readiness, exhausted cursor readiness, publisher stats, and search digest sync. |
| `convex/_generated/api.d.ts` | Regenerated Convex API type surface for the new migration entry point. |

## Migration Strategy
| Input / guard | Logic | Effect |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Clean window | Uses aggregate `skillDailyStats` for `2026-06-12` through `2026-06-18` UTC, after old `clawhub sync` install signals were excluded. | Bases conversion only on the clean telemetry period. |
| Privacy boundary | Reads skill docs, aggregate daily skill stats, stat cursor state, and pending skill stat events. | Does not read user-level install rows, install dedupe rows, IP hashes, paths, logs, prompts, or per-user telemetry. |
| Global fallback | `407 installs / 10,777 downloads = 3.78%`. | Gives sparse skills a neutral clean-window baseline. |
| Per-skill smoothing | If clean-window downloads are at least `100`, uses `(clean_installs + global_rate * 1000) / (clean_downloads + 1000)`. Otherwise uses the global rate. | Lets active skills earn a stronger/slower rate while preventing tiny recent samples from dominating old downloads. |
| Cap | `smoothed_rate = min(10%, per_skill_rate)`. | Prevents extreme clean-window ratios from creating oversized historical bumps. |
| Target | `round(stable_all_time_downloads * smoothed_rate)`, then `max(current_all_time_installs, estimated)`. | Backfill can only raise all-time installs; it never lowers a skill. |
| Pending-event compensation | Adds already-daily-applied pending downloads into the estimate input, and subtracts already-daily-applied pending install deltas from the immediate skill patch. | Avoids underestimating downloads and avoids double-counting installs when the later skill-doc sync drains. |
| Readiness gate | Requires the daily-stats cursor to cover the clean window, or allows an exhausted event queue after the clean-window cutoff. | Prevents writing estimates from partial daily stats while still allowing low-traffic deployments to run. |
| Write | Patches both `statsInstallsAllTime` and `stats.installsAllTime`, writes `installBackfill`, adjusts publisher stats, and syncs `skillSearchDigest`. | Keeps migrated stat fields and denormalized ranking/search data aligned. |
| Operator guard | Dry-runs by default. Apply requires `confirm="apply-skill-install-backfill"` and runs through `@convex-dev/migrations`. | Gives operators preview, batching, resume tracking, and an explicit apply step. |

## Expected Impact
These numbers use the production aggregate snapshot used to choose the model. Production apply recomputes from live `skills`, `skillDailyStats`, cursor, and pending `skillStatEvents` rows at run time.

| Skill | Clean-window downloads | Clean-window installs | Raw clean rate | Smoothed rate | Current all-time installs | Expected all-time installs | Expected bump |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| `self-improving-agent` | 2,189 | 84 | 3.84% | 3.82% | 6,926 | 17,648 | +10,722 |
| `skill-vetter` | 1,641 | 76 | 4.63% | 4.31% | 4,679 | 11,142 | +6,463 |
| `github` | 1,078 | 44 | 4.08% | 3.93% | 4,500 | 7,500 | +3,000 |
| `ontology` | 781 | 29 | 3.71% | 3.75% | 1,420 | 7,115 | +5,695 |
| `proactive-agent` | 903 | 42 | 4.65% | 4.19% | 3,047 | 7,099 | +4,052 |
| `self-improving` | 1,124 | 37 | 3.29% | 3.52% | 2,205 | 7,036 | +4,831 |
| `weather` | 844 | 36 | 4.27% | 4.00% | 3,892 | 6,446 | +2,554 |
| `skillscan` | 245 | 4 | 1.63% | 3.35% | 17 | 5,978 | +5,961 |
| `gog` | 871 | 19 | 2.18% | 3.03% | 3,664 | 5,654 | +1,990 |
| `multi-search-engine` | 1,101 | 36 | 3.27% | 3.51% | 2,176 | 5,393 | +3,217 |

Expected top order by all-time installs after this one-time estimate: `self-improving-agent`, `skill-vetter`, `github`, `ontology`, `proactive-agent`, `self-improving`, `weather`, `skillscan`, `gog`, `multi-search-engine`.

## Operator Flow
| Step | Command | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Dry run | `bunx convex run migrations:runSkillInstallBackfill '{"dryRun":true}'` | Runs a tracked dry-run batch and returns the model config plus `confirmRequired`. |
| Apply | `bunx convex run migrations:runSkillInstallBackfill '{"dryRun":false,"confirm":"apply-skill-install-backfill"}'` | Runs the migration to completion through `@convex-dev/migrations`. |

Before production apply, create a manual Convex dashboard backup for the target deployment and confirm it completed.

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | Result |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Migration strategy table | Reviewers can trace how aggregate clean-window stats become the final install bump. | Included above |
| Expected impact table | Reviewers can see the intended ranking and install-count shape before production apply. | Included above |
| Focused estimator tests | Skillscan-style old downloads get historical credit; ontology-style stronger clean conversion ranks higher; tiny clean windows fall back to the global rate; higher existing install totals are not lowered. | Passed: 15 focused tests with migration tests |
| Migration body tests | Dry-run and confirm gating work; stale clean-window stats are rejected; exhausted low-traffic cursors are allowed; publisher stats and search digests are synced. | Passed: 15 focused tests with estimator tests |
| Convex runtime check | The new Convex functions and index validate in a development deployment. | Passed: functions ready; `skillStatEvents.by_skill_processed` added in dev |
| Convex dry run | The new internal action is callable through Convex and returns the expected model config without applying changes. | Passed: `ok=true`, `dryRun=true`, `confirmRequired="apply-skill-install-backfill"` |
| `$code-review` | Native Codex review and independent cold review both found no remaining actionable findings on the same final target. | Passed: 3 native clean passes and 3 cold-review clean passes |

## Verification
```text
python3 /Users/jmerhi/repos/AGENT.MDs/skills/pr-proof-pack/scripts/pr_net_diff.py --markdown
# net diff: 6 files changed, 1043 insertions, 3 deletions; no branch-only churn

bun test convex/lib/skillInstallBackfill.test.ts convex/migrations.test.ts
# 2 files passed, 15 tests passed

bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
# passed

git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
# passed

bunx convex dev --once --typecheck=disable
# Convex functions ready; development deployment accepted skillStatEvents.by_skill_processed

bunx convex run migrations:runSkillInstallBackfill '{"dryRun":true}'
# returned ok=true, dryRun=true, confirmRequired="apply-skill-install-backfill"

bun run ci:static
# passed

bunx vitest run src/components/SkillPublishSuccessDialog.test.tsx --coverage=false
# passed: 8 tests; rerun after the first full ci:unit attempt hit this unrelated UI test

bun run ci:unit
# passed on retry: 282 files passed, 3604 tests passed, 1 skipped; coverage thresholds met
```
target.author: jesse-merhi

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
